name: four-layer-sequential
description: Sequential four-layer workflow plugin that chains intake, path location, and path economics planning.

interface.shortDescription: Run intake, path location, and economics planning in order.
interface.longDescription: Bundles three four-layer reasoning skills and adds a sequential entry skill that feeds each stage into the next.
defaultPrompt: 用 four-layer 串联分析这段需求并推荐路径。
先做 intake，再定位 path，最后做 economics decision。
把这段混合输入做成完整的四层串联报告。
